HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.debugNotice: 調試須知: 調試執行將會僅最多執行20秒 或 渲染 Payload 最多 300 條
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.bruteforce_csrf_with_token: 爆破 CSRF（帶有保護用 token）

HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.bruteforce_sm4_cbc: [國密-爆破] SM4-CBC 字典加密爆破
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.bruteforce_sm2: [國密-爆破] SM2 公鑰加密字典爆破
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.bidirectional_aes_cbc: [AES] 請求&響應 AES-CBC 雙向加解密
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.sign_appkey_timestamp_nonce: [簽名] AppKey+Timestamp+Nonce 三方簽名生成
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.sign_body_md5_sm3: [簽名] Body MD5/SM3 防篡改簽名
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.session_auto_login_token: [會話] 自動登錄注入 Authorization Token
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.tool_randstr_fuzztag: [工具] 隨機字串 fuzz tag
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.response_custom_failure_checker: [響應] customFailureChecker 自定義失敗檢查
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.mirror_flow_extract_chain: [流處理] mirrorHTTPFlow 提取參數鏈
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.challenge_response_sign: [挑戰] 動態 Challenge + HMAC 簽名注入
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.bootstrap_session_pipeline: [會話] Bootstrap 動態會話 + 多 Header 簽名 + 響應解密
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.aes_cbc_key_iv_envelope: [AES] 自帶 key/iv 信封協議雙向加解密
HTTPFuzzerHotPatch.webFuzzerHotReloadOpenTips: 啟用後，每次發送請求將執行當前最新熱加載內容
